series_metadata.series_description: Includes surveys and studies conducted by the P-20 Safety and Security office to statutorily mandate educational facilities to submit an emergency management plan, in order to determine their compliance with ORC 3313.536.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy. Keep until IRN (Internal Retrieval Number) is closed for those deemed not required. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy. Keep until IRN (Internal Retrieval Number) is closed for those deemed not required., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
